creator: dirk@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Jean-Marc Lasgouttes <Jean-Marc.Lasgouttes@inria.fr> put up a new 
patch for lyx-1.1.4 (patch-1.1.4fix3.gz). 

Please check if the upgraded port 
(http://www.physik.TU-Berlin.DE/~ibex/ports/lyx-1.1.4.3.tar.gz) 
fixes your problem. BTW. it should fix PR ports/17268), too.
